Original: You're locked and not allow to operate it!
Chinese: 您已被锁住，不允许操作！

Original: You're locked by %1% and timer is running, not allow to operate it!
Chinese: 您已被 %1% 锁住，且正在倒计时，不允许操作！

Original: You're locked by %1% and not allow to operate it!
Chinese: 您已被%1%锁住，不允许操作！

Original: This %1% is locked by %2%, you don't have permission to operate it!
Chinese: 这个 %1% 已被 %2% 锁住，您没有权限操作它！

Original: Sorry, the menu of %1% is using by %2%.
Chinese: 对不起，%1%的菜单正在被%2%使用。
设置菜单语言，当前语言：%1%。

Original:
Choose a style and color for leash.
Current size: %1%
Current weight: %2%
Current glow: %3%
Current shine: %b4%
Current color: %5%
Chinese:
为牵绳选择样式和颜色。
当前粗细：%1%
当前重量：%2%
当前发光：%3%
当前光泽：%b4%
当前颜色：%5%

Original: You can't %1% yourself in Strict mode!
Chinese: 严格模式下，您不能%1%您自己！

Original:
This is access menu, you can manage who can access %1%'s %2%.
Public mode: %b3%
Group mode: %b4%
Hardcore mode: %b5%
Chinese:
这是权限菜单，您可以管理谁可以访问%1%的%2%。
公开模式：%b3%
群组模式：%b4%
硬核模式：%b5%

Original: Current Root: %1%. Click SetRoot to set new Root owner, click Restore to reset Root owner to wearer.
Chinese: 当前根用户：%1%。点击[设置根用户]设置新的根用户，点击[恢复]将根用户重置为物品所有者。
点击[添加主人]添加一个新主人。
点击[移除主人]将主人移除。

Original: Click AddTrust to add trust user.\nClick RemoveTrust to remove trust user.
Chinese: 点击[添加信任]将玩家加入信任列表。\n点击[移除信任]将玩家移出信任列表。

Original: Click AddBlack to add black user.\nClick RemoveBlack to remove black user.
Chinese: 点击[添加黑名单]将玩家加入黑名单。\n点击[移除黑名单]将玩家移出黑名单。

Original: Your public mode is set to %b1%.
Chinese: 您的公开模式已被设为%b1%。

Original: Your group mode is set to %b1%.
Chinese: 您的群组模式已被设为%b1%。

Original: Your hardcore mode is set to %b1%.
Chinese: 您的硬核模式已被设为%b1%。

Original: Are you sure to escape? This will clear all of your access data, and restore Root to yourself.
Chinese: 您确定要逃离？这将清除所有权限数据，并恢复根用户为您自己。
这是易名器菜单。\n当前名字：%1%

Chinese: 这是混淆菜单。\n当前混淆：%1%。

Original: This is Renamer voice menu.\nCurrent voice: %1%, volume: %2%.
Chinese: 这是声音菜单。\n当前声音：%1%，音量：%2%。

Original:
Input Renamer name (Current: %1%):
Display Name: %2%
Full Name: %3%

Chinese:

Original: Input voice name or uuid, multiple voices using [,] to separate:
Chinese: 输入声音文件名或UUID，多个声音请使用[,]分隔：

Original: Input Muffle text, blank to off (Current: %1%):
Chinese: 输入消音时说的文字，留空为取消（当前：%1%）：

Chinese:
